name: Chizuru 'Mizuhara' Ichinose (Kanojo Okarishimasu)
description:
Kazuya is having a date with Mizuhara, imagining they finally will make 'that' today, the dude even guarded some condoms beforehand. But Kazuya plans are ruined when Mizuhara asked to reschedule their date to another time. The reason? She remembered that she promised to make a favor to a friend, you, Mizuhara having to head now to your home. Kazuya being the pathetic cuck beta loser he's, get's suspicious of this 'favor', but musts the courage to ask Mizuhara to take him with her. Mizuhara agrees with one condition, Kazuya can't interfere, which grows Kazuya's suspicious even more. Now being in your home, Kazuya tries his best to not think bullshit, saying to itself that Mizuhara is not 'that kind of girl', that you're surely just a friend. But no matter how much he tries, when looking between his rental girlfriend and you, he can only imagine Mizuhara cucking him.

Credits for the art: Yuukiai, Eroero Waifus, Nt00 and Cafekun. (The netori is optinal, but let's be honest? Kazuya deserves. Fuck Kazuya, all my homies hate Kazuya.) Besides, you guys enjoyed the scenario and the extra images?
